title: Strip the minus sign
prompt: Return the absolute value of n — the number without its sign. If n is negative, flip it positive; otherwise leave it. Try: `return n if n >= 0 else -n`. absolute_value(-5) returns 5.

details.restate: Give back the number's distance from zero: negative numbers come back positive, everything else comes back unchanged.

io.because: zero is zero steps from zero

terms.meaning: how far a number is from zero, ignoring direction
